name: brajyatra-complete
description: Complete BrajYatra.AI — Sacred Braj Travel Planner with AI Agent, Auth, and Virtual Tours

scripts.dev: concurrently -n agent,auth,client -c green,blue,magenta "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.install:all: cd server/agent && npm install && cd ../auth && npm install && cd ../../client && npm install
